top_signals.title: S&P 500 Slumps for Fourth Time in Five Days as Oil Prices Jump
top_signals.summary: The S&P 500 Index slumped on Wednesday following its best day in weeks, as declines in some corners of Big Tech offset gains elsewhere, including energy as oil prices jumped on the escalation of the US-Iran war.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Stocks Churn as Oil Jumps; Tesla Declines Late: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Wall Street investors bracing for the start of the big-tech earnings season sent stocks wavering while worries about an escalation of the Iran war boosted oil prices.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Iran war 'stagflation' premium quietly mounts - Reuters
top_signals.summary: Iran war 'stagflation' premium quietly mounts  Reuters

top_signals.title: Nestlé nears deal to sell stake in €5bn Perrier unit
top_signals.summary: Swiss group races to agree terms with Platinum Equity for water business, whose brands include San Pellegrino
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Mercedes risks US sales ban under Senate China bill
top_signals.summary: Commerce panel to vote on legislation barring companies with significant Chinese ownership from US market
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: New InfraTrust report reveals infrastructure flaws admins should patch first
top_signals.summary: Eclypsium has launched InfraTrust, a new infrastructure cybersecurity knowledge base and monthly InfraTrust Pulse report designed to help organizations prioritize vulnerabilities affecting infrastructure, firmware, networking, and edge devices. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Japan’s electricity price hits highest in over 3 years on triple blow
top_signals.summary: With a triple whammy of blistering heat, yen weakness and escalating fuel costs, the nationwide day-ahead spot price surged to ¥24.78 a kilowatt-hour on Wednesday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Tesla misses on earnings despite revenue beat
top_signals.summary: Tesla's earnings report lands in the midst of a slide in the company's stock price even as its core auto business is rebounding.
